---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dylan-wheeler-ksu/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/dw-610

---

My name is Dylan Wheeler and I write about AI/ML, wireless communications and information theory.
